steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: In an input-output pair, the first coordinate is the input. For $(8,5)$, the input is $8$.
steps.formula: $$\text{If } (a, b) \text{ is an input-output pair for } f, \text{ then } f(a) = b$$

steps.title: Read the function value
steps.content: The second coordinate is the output, so $f(8)=5$. The answer is A.
